infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FixIT uses your location to find nearby professionals and set your service area.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FixIT uses your location to find nearby professionals and set your service area.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FixIT to access your photos and videos for profile and portfolio showcase.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FixIT to use the camera for your profile picture.
